name: searchatlas
description: MCP server for SearchAtlas AI Agent — SEO, content, PPC, authority building, and site management tools

environment_variables.name: SEARCHATLAS_API_KEY
environment_variables.description: API key authentication (alternative to JWT token)

tools.name: searchatlas_orchestrator
tools.description: Multi-agent coordinator — routes queries to the best specialized agent

tools.name: searchatlas_otto_seo
tools.description: On-page SEO automation — technical fixes, schema markup, optimizations

tools.name: searchatlas_ppc
tools.description: PPC / Google Ads management — campaigns, bids, performance

tools.name: searchatlas_content
tools.description: AI content generation — blog posts, landing pages, optimized copy

tools.name: searchatlas_site_explorer
tools.description: Site audit and analysis — crawl data, backlinks, competitive intelligence

tools.name: searchatlas_gbp
tools.description: Google Business Profile management — listings, reviews, local SEO

tools.name: searchatlas_authority_building
tools.description: Link building and digital PR — outreach, guest posts, authority signals

tools.name: searchatlas_llm_visibility
tools.description: LLM brand monitoring — tracks AI model references to your brand

tools.name: searchatlas_keywords
tools.description: Keyword research — volume, difficulty, SERP analysis, clustering

tools.name: searchatlas_website_studio
tools.description: Website builder — pages, layouts, site structure

tools.name: searchatlas_list_projects
tools.description: List SearchAtlas projects for the authenticated user

tools.name: searchatlas_list_conversations
tools.description: List conversation sessions, optionally filtered by agent

tools.name: searchatlas_list_artifacts
tools.description: List artifacts (code, content, reports) across sessions

tools.name: searchatlas_run_playbook
tools.description: Execute a playbook on a project using the appropriate agent
